description: Case Style: Analog watch with a round stainless steel case and fixed, numbered bezelDial Style: Black dial with branding on the dial, white and steel coloured hour marks and hands, red coloured seconds handFeatures: Screw to reset timeStrap Style: Black coloured PU strap with a tang clasp and holes to customise fitWater resistant up to 10 BARWarranty: 1 year
